# Made for ATS

> AI-powered CV scanner, cover letter generator, and job search toolkit built for SKEMA Business School students and EU professionals.

Made for ATS helps students and professionals land more interviews by optimising CVs for Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS). It runs dual-model AI scans that score CVs against job descriptions, generates tailored cover letters in English and French, builds LinkedIn profiles, creates cold outreach messages, and tracks job applications end-to-end.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Overview of all tools and recent activity.
- [CV Scanner](/scan): Paste your CV and job description to get a brutally honest ATS match score with section-by-section feedback and AI rewrites.
- [Cover Letter Generator](/cover-letter): Generate tailored 3-paragraph cover letters in English or French, optimised for French and EU professional standards.
- [Interview Simulator](/interview): Practise interviews with an AI coach that evaluates your answers and gives feedback grounded in your CV and target role.
- [Interview Q&A](/interview-qa): Get custom interview questions and model answers based on the company, sector, and interview type.
- [CV Version History](/versions): Track every iteration of your CV with automated AI saves and manual entries to compare changes over time.
- [Job Description Optimiser](/jd-optimizer): Refine job descriptions and surface the keywords, skills, and signals that drive ATS matching.
- [Keyword Analyser](/keywords): Identify trending and missing keywords between your CV and the target job description for stronger ATS scoring.
- [Cold Outreach](/cold-outreach): Write warm, concise outreach messages that pitch your fit, value, and credibility in under 90 words.
- [LinkedIn Coach](/linkedin): Audit your LinkedIn profile, estimate your SSI, and get copy-paste fixes for headline, About, and experience.
- [Job Application Tracker](/tracker): Track CDI, CDD, internship, and freelance applications across stages with a visual board built for job seekers.
- [Company Contacts](/contacts): Manage CEOs, HR, and Marketing leads in a spreadsheet-style directory with bulk Excel import.
- [Notes](/notes): Capture company research, interview notes, and follow-up reminders in one organised workspace.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Showcase your projects and case studies in a portfolio tailored to your target roles.
- [Elevator Pitch](/elevator-pitch): Generate 30, 60, and 90-second elevator pitches grounded in your CV and target role.
- [Profile](/profile): Manage your account, CV, and preferences for the Made for ATS toolkit.
- [Support](/support): Get help with the Made for ATS toolkit, from CV scanning to interview prep.
- [About](/about): Made for ATS is an AI-powered job-search toolkit built for SKEMA Business School students and EU professionals.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap for search engine indexing.
- [Robots](/robots.txt): Crawler directives for search engines.
